author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Indiana Jones and the Great Circle – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, now on Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/indiana-jones-and-the-great-circle-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Become the legendary archaeologist, solve one of history’s greatest mysteries, and avoid snakes at all costs. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is a first-person, single-player adventure set between the events of Raiders of the Lost Ark and The Last Crusade.  

#NintendoSwitch2 #IndianaJones #IndianaJonesandtheGreatCircle 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
